description: CompositionBlack sleeveless quilted jacket made of 100% polyester, that has a mock neck, thermal lining, insert pockets on the sides with zippered closures, zippered closure on the front and concealed doggles on the sides on the insideStrategically placed ports for hassle free management of earphone cordsTrims created from nike Grind material that is made from post-production waste materialsFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowCool iron onlyDo not dry cleanDo not iron on print or embroideryGet some serious street cred in this black jacket from nike. The soft and warm thermal filling gives lightweight comfort, while the mock neck and quilted design gives serious urban edge. Team this with long sleeved tees, low slung jeans and sports shoes for a casual look with an aggressive edge.
